name: copilotprompts-prompt-of-the-week
title: Prompt of the Week Skill
shortDescription: A Cowork skill that provides a curated 'Prompt of the Week' for inspiration and productivity.
longDescription: This skill delivers a weekly prompt designed to spark creativity, learning, or productivity within your team. Each week, a new prompt is featured, encouraging users to explore new ideas, reflect, or take action. Ideal for teams looking to foster engagement and continuous improvement using Microsoft Copilot Cowork.

thumbnails.alt: Prompt of the Week skill demo

references.name: Copilot Cowork Skills Documentation
references.description: Official documentation for Copilot Cowork skills integration.
